code: import{applyMiddleware,createStore,compose}from"redux";import thunk from"redux-thunk";import rootReducer from"./reducers";var middleware=[thunk];var composeEnhancers=window.__REDUX_DEVTOOLS_EXTENSION_COMPOSE__||compose;var store=createStore(rootReducer,composeEnhancers(applyMiddleware.apply(void 0,middleware)));export default store;
